name: Malee Group Public Company Limited
summary: Malee Group Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes canned agriculture products, fruit juices, and non-alcohol beverages in Thailand and internationally. The company offers UHT and pasteurized vegetable and fruit juices under the Malee, Malee Food Service, Malee Tropical, and Malee Coco brands; and UHT box drinking water, other beverages, and PET plastic bottles under the Malee and good water brands. It also provides UHT and pasteurized milk and milk tablets under the brand name Chockhai Farm, as well as corn milk under the Malee I-Corn brand name; and TurBusta Maxx branded canned coffee. In addition, the company offers canned seasonal fruits, including rambutan, rambutan stuffed with pineapple, lychees, longans, water chestnuts, sugar palm, mangoes, etc.; canned sweet corn; canned pineapple; and canned mixed fruits under the brand names Malee, First Choice, Farmer, and Malee Foods Service. Further, it provides research and development services for scientifically transformation agriculture solutions; and engages in the contract manufacturing business. The company was formerly known as Malee Sampran Public Company Limited and changed its name to Malee Group Public Company Limited in April 2016. Malee Group Public Company Limited was founded in 1978 and is based in Lam Luk Ka, Thailand.
